## Public Contract Gate

When this PR changes `x-ui`, `/schemas/filtered`, `/schemas/catalog`,
`/schemas/surfaces`, `/schemas/actions`, `/capabilities`, annotations, OpenAPI
enrichment, headers, ETag, `X-Schema-Hash`, public base controllers, or
generated schema semantics:

- [ ] Starter version or controlled local install used for downstream validation:
- [ ] `praxis-api-quickstart` validation command and result:
- [ ] Docs/examples reviewed or updated:
- [ ] No `target/**`, `.flattened-pom.xml`, `.m2repo/`, or generated release artifacts are included:
- [ ] Remaining unvalidated scope, if any:

For changes outside the public contract, mark this section as not applicable and explain why.
